meaning: n.手册,指南adj.手的,手动的,手工的,体力的,手册(性质)的,[律]实际占有的
examples: There is a manual pump to get rid of the water.
She opened her desk drawer and took out the manual.
They renovated churches, tended to lepers, performed manual labor for farmers and artisans, preached, and prayed.
You may find yourself dealing with difficult, demanding bosses and doing manual work besides.
